QF.id: VIII Introduction to Forwards and Futures_130

question.text: The contract cycle for BSE Sensex futures includes:

answer.text: 7 serial weekly and 3 serial monthly contracts
3 monthly contracts only (near, next, far month)
12 monthly contracts covering the full year

explanation.text: **The Logic:** BSE Sensex futures offer 7 serial weekly and 3 serial monthly contracts. Monthly contracts expire on the last Thursday of the contract month, and weekly contracts expire on Thursday. This differs from NSE Nifty which uses Tuesday expiry. **The Trap:** BSE uses Thursday, NSE uses Tuesday. Also BSE has 7 weekly contracts while the number of weekly contracts may differ across products. **Cross-Exam Context:** Contract cycle differences between exchanges are tested. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** BSE = Thursday expiry, 7 weekly + 3 monthly. NSE = Tuesday expiry, different contract structure.
